content: Recharts 3.9.2 (latest on npm, verified via npm view) explicitly declares react/react-dom/react-is peerDependencies as ^16.8.0 || ^17.0.0 || ^18.0.0 || ^19.0.0 -- full React 19 support, no --legacy-peer-deps flag needed. Older recharts 2.x releases only supported up to React 18 and needed react-is override tricks.
